turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hi there, I am desperate to get some help for my ongoing depression, is there anything that you can do?

results.term: Well, it's not really any worse tonight than it ha...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, it's not really any worse tonight than it has been for years. I just don't know how to get out of it and I suspect that I might never be able to.

results.term: I have been prescribed some medication by my GP bu...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been prescribed some medication by my GP but I cannot really afford professional counselling.

results.term: I am sorry for the delay, I had a personal emergen...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am sorry for the delay, I had a personal emergency. What sort of things are you talking about?

results.term: No, I am British. There are limited resources avai...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No, I am British. There are limited resources available here but not many and there's a waiting list.

results.term: The trouble is also that I have tried a variety of...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The trouble is also that I have tried a variety of medications and none has really been all that helpful.

results.term: Yes, I am on some waiting lists but I do not know ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, I am on some waiting lists but I do not know how long it might take to get to the top of them.

results.term: Why do you say that medication is not the best ide...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Why do you say that medication is not the best idea? I am aware that it is not a panacea but it can help to take the edge off, as it were.

results.term: I think that there are some conditions where medic...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think that there are some conditions where medication is necessary but I do take your point that there are other things that we can do to alleviate symptom. Maybe it is best to do these things in tandem?

results.term: I also went through a lot of different combination...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I also went through a lot of different combinations before ending on on Prozac. I think that different things work for different people. I do not find it very easy to talk to people.

results.term: No, I am rather way of 'natural' or homeopathic me...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No, I am rather way of 'natural' or homeopathic medicine. Are there any kinds that you could recommend?

results.term: I do do a lot of that but I would feel too shy to ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I do do a lot of that but I would feel too shy to show anyone my journal. Your help has been invaluable though and I do feel more receptive to other forms of treatment now.

results.term: I often do go over things that I've rewritten but ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I often do go over things that I've rewritten but there can be long periods where I just feel that I have nothing to say. Thank you so much for your help though, I do feel a lot better! I hope to see you again soon.
